requirement_topic.en: Zimbabwe Grid-Connection Standards — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 津巴布韦并网标准——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 辛巴威併網標準——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Zimbabwe grid-tied PV projects should prepare inverter grid-interface evidence around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 61000 power-quality evidence, and project-specific ZETDC connection conditions. Zimbabwe's low-voltage supply is commonly treated as 230/400 V at 50 Hz, so inverter firmware profiles, voltage and frequency trip windows, reconnection timing, active/reactive power functions, export limitation, and commissioning records should be validated for the Zimbabwe site rather than only for China 220/380 V factory settings.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦并网光伏项目应围绕IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 61000电能质量证据以及项目特定ZETDC接入条件准备逆变器并网证据。津巴布韦低压供电通常按230/400 V、50 Hz处理，因此逆变器固件配置、电压和频率跳闸窗口、重连时间、有功/无功功能、限发功能及投运记录应针对津巴布韦现场验证，而不能仅依据中国220/380 V出厂设置。
summary.zht: 辛巴威併網光伏項目應圍繞IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 61000電能品質證據以及項目特定ZETDC接入條件準備逆變器併網證據。辛巴威低壓供電通常按230/400 V、50 Hz處理，因此逆變器韌體配置、電壓和頻率跳閘窗口、重連時間、有功/無功功能、限發功能及投運記錄應針對辛巴威現場驗證，而不能僅依據中國220/380 V出廠設置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality requirements, where applicable
ZERA Electricity Grid Code and Electricity Distribution Code regulations
ZETDC project-specific distribution-network connection and commissioning conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 inverter technical requirements, GB/T 37408-2021 inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding and grid-support tests. These are designed around Chinese grid rules and voltage profiles and should not be submitted as a substitute for Zimbabwe IEC evidence or ZETDC-approved settings.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021逆变器要求，以及国内防孤岛和电网支撑测试。这些文件围绕中国电网规则和电压配置设计，不应作为津巴布韦IEC证据或ZETDC批准参数的替代。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021逆變器要求，以及國內防孤島和電網支撐測試。這些文件圍繞中國電網規則和電壓配置設計，不應作為辛巴威IEC證據或ZETDC批准參數的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范

gap.en: Gap: China grid certificates do not prove IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 conformity, Zimbabwe 230/400 V settings, or ZETDC acceptance. Exporters should provide model-specific IEC anti-islanding and utility-interface evidence, firmware setting tables, locked parameter files, commissioning screenshots, and any protection studies requested by ZETDC or the project engineer.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书不能证明IEC 62116 / IEC 61727符合性、津巴布韦230/400 V参数或ZETDC接受。出口商应提供特定型号的IEC防孤岛和公用电网接口证据、固件参数表、锁定参数文件、投运截图，以及ZETDC或项目工程师要求的任何保护研究。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書不能證明IEC 62116 / IEC 61727符合性、辛巴威230/400 V參數或ZETDC接受。出口商應提供特定型號的IEC防孤島和公用電網介面證據、韌體參數表、鎖定參數文件、投運截圖，以及ZETDC或項目工程師要求的任何保護研究。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied projects where ZERA electricity regulation, the Grid Code, the Distribution Code, ZETDC connection review, net-metering, or project procurement requires grid-interface evidence; project-specific connection approval remains a gate.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T grid evidence does not transfer to Zimbabwe ZERA/ZETDC grid-connection acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62116, IEC 61727, Zimbabwe 230/400 V 50 Hz firmware settings, and ZETDC connection conditions as separate gates from China GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408-2021, or NB/T 32004 evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 62116、IEC 61727、津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz固件参数和ZETDC接入条件视为独立于中国GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004证据的门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 62116、IEC 61727、辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz韌體參數和ZETDC接入條件視為獨立於中國GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004證據的門檻。

requirement_topic.en: ZERA Licensing and Net-Metering — Rooftop, C&I, and Captive Solar Projects
requirement_topic.zh: ZERA许可和净计量——户用、工商业及自备太阳能项目
requirement_topic.zht: ZERA許可和淨計量——戶用、工商業及自備太陽能項目

summary.en: Zimbabwe's prolonged load-shedding has driven strong rooftop, commercial and industrial, mining, and battery-backed solar uptake. ZERA is the energy-sector regulator and publishes electricity application forms, regulations, grid-code and distribution-code documents, generation licence materials, and net-metering-related regulatory materials. Projects that export power, sell electricity, participate in net metering, or exceed applicable licence thresholds should treat ZERA licensing or registration and ZETDC metering/connection review as project gates, separate from inverter type testing.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦长期限电推动了户用、工商业、矿业及带电池储能太阳能系统的快速采用。ZERA是能源行业监管机构，并发布电力申请表、法规、电网规范和配电规范文件、发电许可证材料以及净计量相关监管材料。上网、售电、参与净计量或超过适用许可门槛的项目，应将ZERA许可或登记以及ZETDC计量/接入审查视为项目门槛，且该门槛独立于逆变器型式试验。
summary.zht: 辛巴威長期限電推動了戶用、工商業、礦業及帶電池儲能太陽能系統的快速採用。ZERA是能源行業監管機構，並發布電力申請表、法規、電網規範和配電規範文件、發電許可證材料以及淨計量相關監管材料。上網、售電、參與淨計量或超過適用許可門檻的項目，應將ZERA許可或登記以及ZETDC計量/接入審查視為項目門檻，且該門檻獨立於逆變器型式試驗。

standards_or_laws: ZERA Energy Regulatory Authority Act and Electricity Act mandate
ZERA electricity application forms and generation licence application materials
ZERA Electricity Grid Code and Electricity Distribution Code regulations
ZERA net-metering regulations and ZETDC metering / connection review where applicable

summary.en: China distributed-PV connection approvals and grid-company acceptance records are based on Chinese NEA policy, State Grid or China Southern Power Grid procedures, GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408-2021, and NB/T 32004. Those approvals do not create a Zimbabwe generation licence, net-metering eligibility, or ZETDC connection right.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏接入审批和电网公司验收记录依据中国国家能源局政策、国家电网或南方电网程序、GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004。上述审批不会产生津巴布韦发电许可证、净计量资格或ZETDC接入权利。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏接入審批和電網公司驗收記錄依據中國國家能源局政策、國家電網或南方電網程序、GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004。上述審批不會產生辛巴威發電許可證、淨計量資格或ZETDC接入權利。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范

gap.en: Gap: project approval is not the same as product compliance. For Zimbabwe rooftop, C&I, mining, and captive solar projects, confirm whether the plant size, export arrangement, sale of electricity, battery configuration, or net-metering application triggers ZERA licensing or registration and ZETDC interconnection conditions before committing equipment.
gap.zh: 差距：项目审批不同于产品合规。对于津巴布韦户用、工商业、矿业和自备太阳能项目，应在确定设备前确认电站规模、上网安排、售电、电池配置或净计量申请是否触发ZERA许可或登记以及ZETDC互联条件。
gap.zht: 差距：項目審批不同於產品合規。對於辛巴威戶用、工商業、礦業和自備太陽能項目，應在確定設備前確認電站規模、上網安排、售電、電池配置或淨計量申請是否觸發ZERA許可或登記以及ZETDC互聯條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project falls within ZERA licensing, registration, net-metering, or ZETDC interconnection scope; thresholds and forms must be checked against current ZERA materials before project submission.
mandatory_status.cn: Not transferable — Chinese distributed-PV approvals do not satisfy Zimbabwe ZERA licensing, net-metering, or ZETDC connection requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ZERA licensing or net-metering and ZETDC connection review are project gates, not inverter certificates. Confirm current ZERA thresholds, forms, and ZETDC metering or export-limitation requirements before shipping equipment for rooftop, C&I, mining, or captive solar projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ZERA许可或净计量以及ZETDC接入审查是项目门槛，不是逆变器证书。为户用、工商业、矿业或自备太阳能项目发货前，应确认现行ZERA门槛、表格以及ZETDC计量或限发要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ZERA許可或淨計量以及ZETDC接入審查是項目門檻，不是逆變器證書。為戶用、工商業、礦業或自備太陽能項目發貨前，應確認現行ZERA門檻、表格以及ZETDC計量或限發要求。
